resources.string: A 30-day journey of wisdom, duty, and self-realization.
Meditate on Sanskrit verses & translations directly from the battlefield of Kurukshetra.
Scroll a daily-changing feed of posts from Yudhisthira, Arjuna, Karna, Shakuni, and Lord Krishna.
Receive personalized messages and advice from characters in your inbox.
Bookmark shlokas and guidance to build your own profile of eternal wisdom.
Perform your duty with a calm mind.
